title: Refactor OCP-020 (OCP): Hardcoded switch on configuration protocol strings
apply_error: no patch blocks produced by LLM

detected_issue.description: Hardcoded switch on configuration protocol strings
detected_issue.reasoning: The method uses a switch statement to map protocol strings ('string', 'file', 'x-pack-metrics', etc.) to human-readable descriptions. This violates OCP because introducing a new configuration source requires modifying the core pipeline class. Instead, the source metadata objects should provide their own descriptive details polymorphically.

fix_logic.summary: Refactor pipeline source details to use polymorphic description method
fix_logic.rationale: The switch statement in AbstractPipelineExt.getPipelineSourceDetails violates the Open/Closed Principle. By moving the responsibility of providing a description to the SourceWithMetadata class (or a new interface), we allow new source types to be added without modifying the core pipeline logic.
